reference: THROWING HIMSELF ON HIS KNEES BEFORE THE KING HE CRIED OH ROYAL SIRE BESTOW UPON ME ALSO A SWORD AND A STEED THAT I MAY UP AND AWAY TO FOLLOW MY BRETHREN
text: throwing himself on his knees before the king he cried o royal sire bestow upon me also a sword and a steed that i may up and away to follow my brethren o royal sire bestow upon me also a steed that i may up and away to follow my brethren
